description_long: This is a robust, multi-tiered metal shelving unit designed for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The structure features three main horizontal shelves, each divided into several compartments by vertical dividers, creating a grid-like storage system. The front and back panels display a geometric pattern of alternating solid and open sections, enhancing both ventilation and visual interest. The frame is constructed from sturdy metal bars, providing stability and durability for heavy-duty use. The open sides and slatted shelves allow for easy access and visibility of stored items. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on maximizing storage capacity and organization.
description: A heavy-duty metal shelving unit with three main shelves, vertical dividers, and geometric front and back panels. Designed for organized storage in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric paneling and multiple open compartments across three shelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the vertical dividers, with a clear view of the open slatted design.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with geometric cutouts and visible compartment divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slatted shelves and vertical dividers.
